abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Attack}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information}, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} related to your knowledge of watercraft, water travel, or aquatic environments or creatures, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} by boat or ship, add +1. On a strong hit, also choose one.

  • The wind is at your back: Mark progress twice.
  • Find safe anchor: @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.LzbHBsqjqOWtSmnX]{Make Camp} now and reroll any dice.
  • Reap the bounty: @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} now and reroll any dice.
When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} aboard a boat or ship, reroll any dice.
